name: Dissolution of the first Constituent Assembly
era: Dominion of Pakistan — the Interim Framework (1947–1956)
key_provisions: Assembly dissolved on the claim that it had 'lost the confidence of the people'
Draft constitution then near completion was abandoned
Set up the confrontation tested in the Tamizuddin litigation
demise: Validated, in effect, by the Federal Court in 1955 — entrenching executive supremacy over elected assemblies.
